mapper.sql: id, user_id, type, title, content, link, is_read, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (user_id, type, title, content, link, is_read) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{link}, 0)

INSERT INTO notification (user_id, type, title, content, link, is_read) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.type}, #{item.title}, #{item.content}, #{item.link}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM notification WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
